_comment: Configuration-driven Vimshottari Dasha data (Priority 3.2). The 120-year Vimshottari cycle, its fixed 9-lord sequence, and each lord's duration in years — pure reference data, consumed by dashaRuleEvaluator.js. The sequence order also matches nakshatraProfile.json's lordCycle (both start the cycle at Ashwini/Ketu), so Mahadasha-at-birth is derived by locating the birth Nakshatra's lord in this same sequence.
